expectations.text: Explains how to manually correct speaker labels in chunk markdown files
expectations.evidence: Step 1 shows before/after example replacing UNKNOWN with correct name in chunk md

expectations.text: Mentions the shattered-audio retrain command for updating profiles from corrections
expectations.evidence: Full retrain command: 'shattered-audio retrain Inbox/s12-chunk-001.md --audio-dir Inbox/ --blend 0.7'

expectations.text: Mentions adjusting speaker_threshold as a tuning lever
expectations.evidence: Dedicated section 'Lower the speaker threshold' with config example showing 0.60

expectations.text: Notes that short utterances (<2s) are a known cause of UNKNOWN labels
expectations.evidence: "Utterances under about 2 seconds produce unreliable embeddings"

expectations.text: Suggests re-enrolling with longer audio samples to improve profile quality
Mentions checking speaker_confidence in chunk frontmatter for diagnostics
expectations.evidence: Mentions checking _meta.yaml sample_count but does NOT mention speaker_confidence in chunk frontmatter
